field_notes.profile_ids: UUID list fixture; does not prove GameProfile, session, skin, chat, or player-list state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound player_info_remove packet framing and dispatch/decode for one UUID-list fixture only; do not infer GameProfile/session/player-list state, Play entry, render readiness, or client-load completion.
